title: ACE Eddie Awards 2026 Winners List - American Cinema Editors
text: The American Cinema Editors presented the 2026 ACE Eddie Awards with the following top winners: Best Edited Feature Drama - Sinners by Michael P. Shawver, Best Edited Feature Comedy - One Battle After Another by Andy Jurgensen, Best Edited Animated Feature - KPop Demon Hunters by Nathan Schauf. Television awards included The Pitt (Drama Series), The Penguin (Limited Series), The Studio (Single Camera Comedy), Frasier (Multi-Camera Comedy), and South Park (Animated Series). Documentary awards went to The Perfect Neighbor (Documentary Feature). Special Honors recognized filmmaker Ang Lee with the Filmmaker of the Year honor and presented Career Achievement awards to veteran editors Arthur Forney and Robert Leighton. YouTube received the Visionary Award. The ceremony recognized several late industry figures in the In Memoriam segment. The ACE Eddie Awards winners are considered influential indicators for the Academy Awards Best Film Editing category.
